active_schema:
Table: data
Columns:
  - model                TEXT     (e.g. ' 5 Series')
  - year                 REAL     (e.g. '2014.0')
  - price                REAL     (e.g. '11200.0')
  - transmission         TEXT     (e.g. 'Automatic')
  - mileage              REAL     (e.g. '67068.0')
  - fueltype             TEXT     (e.g. 'Diesel')
  - tax                  REAL     (e.g. '125.0')
  - mpg                  REAL     (e.g. '57.6')
  - enginesize           REAL     (e.g. '2.0')
  - unnamed_9            REAL     (e.g. '')
  - unnamed_10           REAL     (e.g. '')
  - unnamed_11           REAL     (e.g. '')
